purpose: Targets from WBS09 post-failed-apply readback and sort-direction v2 dry-run that show the Airtable sort panel in field-picker/add-sort-row state rather than a change-direction state.
target_keys: Repo Surface Registry::WBS09 - Replacement or Retirement

safety: Do not use for filter repair, sort field replacement on an existing row, view creation, deletion, or broad repair. Apply requires explicit token and after-reload readback.
